---
title: "bio302_everything"
author: "Gustav Sundvor"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
#| warning: false
```

```{r}
#| output: false
#| label: importing packages.

## Importing packages.
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(FSA)
library(gt)
library(broom)
library(targets)
```

```{r}
#| output: false
#| label: data import and cleaning

## Importing data.
herring_data <- herring_read()

## Cleaning data.
herring_clean <- cleaning_herring(herring_data)
```

```{}
```
